title: Repository Path Index
description: Generated index of repository paths and high-signal entrypoints used for retrieval and navigation.

$schema.description: Schema identifier for this repository path index artifact.

id.description: Stable identifier for the repository path index artifact.

title.description: Human-readable title for the index artifact.

coverage_mode.description: Declares whether the index covers curated entrypoints or a broader generated repository tree.

root_path.description: Repository-relative root path for the index scope.

entries.description: Indexed repository path records used for retrieval and navigation.

path.description: Repository-relative path for the indexed file or directory.

kind.description: Whether the indexed path points to a file or directory.

surface_kind.description: Short label for the surface family such as workflow, standard, template, or control_plane.

summary.description: Concise retrieval-oriented description of why the path matters.

parent_path.description: Repository-relative parent path or . for root-level entries.

aliases.description: Optional alternate query terms for the path.

tags.description: Optional retrieval-oriented tags for the path.

related_paths.description: Optional related repository paths strongly associated with the entry.
